series_metadata.series_title: Direct Services & Mediation Case Management Files – Special Education
series_metadata.series_description: Contain correspondence and other pertinent information relative to direct facilitation and direct mediation requested involving the provision of special education programs and services to suspected students with disabilities and students with suspected disabilities.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain three (3) years after case is closed, then destroy ; Paper: Retain three (3) years after case is closed, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
